recommendations.overview: The lives of a disparate group of unfulfilled people converge at a small, seaside English hotel.

recommendations.title: Brokeback Mountain

recommendations.overview: A socially awkward and volatile small business owner meets the love of his life after being threatened by a gang of scammers.
